title: SN medium
author: Roscoff Culture Collection

steps_raw.instruction: Autoclave and filter aged seawater Work under laminar flow hood. Add to 800mL of seawater the following nutriments that have been autoclaved beforehand (except vitamin) %s %s Filter the medium on 0.2µm (do not autoclave)

Cyano Trace Metal Solution Dissolve all these components separately in milliQ water %s %s Combine the various solutions after full dissolution Make final volume up to 1L with milliQ water Store in refrigerator
